mapper.select: SELECT id, section, title, body, image_url, sort_order, published, updated_at FROM village_content WHERE published = true ORDER BY section, sort_order
SELECT id, section, title, body, image_url, sort_order, published, updated_at FROM village_content WHERE published = true AND section = #{section} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT id, section, title, body, image_url, sort_order, published, updated_at FROM village_content ORDER BY section, sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO village_content (section, title, body, image_url, sort_order, published) VALUES (#{section}, #{title}, #{body}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{published}) RETURNING id, section, title, body, image_url, sort_order, published, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE village_content SET section = COALESCE(#{section}, section), title = COALESCE(#{title}, title), body = COALESCE(#{body}, body), image_url = COALESCE(#{imageUrl}, image_url), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), published = COALESCE(#{published}, published), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} RETURNING id, section, title, body, image_url, sort_order, published, updated_at
